_comment: Curated Charlotte-area model-home / furnished / leaseback opportunities, biased to Matt's target: furnished model townhome under $350K from a leaseback-friendly builder. Prices and availability are curated leads to VERIFY BY PHONE — model releases move weekly. Refreshed by the daily scan when builder emails confirm specifics.

listings.description: YOUR DEAL — PRIMARY SOURCE (signed contract, Lot 71, Remely A322/B/N): $398,934 contract (base $395,990 + $2,944 options) reduced to $378,987 on the 6/30 revision — your 5% price-reduction ask EXECUTED — plus $3,153 incentives. Earnest $11,950 paid 7/1 (Skyla FCU). Old Republic NC/SC home warranty (no-limit HVAC) + 2/10 structural balance. Leaseback $2,600/mo × 12 + two 3-mo extensions. ⚠ Verify the Investor Sales Addendum covers the leaseback (rental clause = forfeiture without it). Sales: Jon Wian.
features: Remely plan · Lot 71 · Myers Park High (verify CMS)

listings.address: 7937 Cedarsmith Ct (Lot 1, decorated Beau model), Waxhaw, NC 28173
listings.description: CONFIRMED IN WRITING (Taylor Shane, 6/20): decorated model released for sale at $479,990 with EVERYTHING — furniture, appliances, decorations — plus $10K closing w/ TPC. Warranty: 1-yr Old Republic + ~8 yrs structural remainder (no 1/2/10). Community is in FINAL closeout and Taylor signaled quarter-end flexibility (6/22) and invited a custom scenario. Negotiate: your price + leaseback while they sell the final homes + keep the furniture.
features: Sister lot 5 Sparrow model $452,990 as fallback

listings.address: Jon Wian's second model (Central Living portfolio), Charlotte, NC
listings.description: Jon Wian wrote on 5/29: 'I had someone asking about my OTHER model' — he manages a second model beyond your Craig Ave deal. DW's leaseback structure is proven on your own contract (builder pays rent + HOA until closing; appliances negotiable vs commission). As a repeat buyer mid-closing, you have maximum leverage to ask for the same terms on model #2 before it's marketed.
features: Proven DW leaseback terms (your own deal)

listings.address: Grahym at Southbridge — next model release, Fort Mill, SC 29715
listings.description: The Fort Mill play: the York model (HS24, fully decorated turnkey) went under contract within weeks — proof Tri Pointe sells Southbridge models and they move fast. Community still has to-be-built inventory (HS 10/44/46/47 closing Sep–Dec), so a sales model stays open for months = leaseback runway. Ask Debbie for FIRST REFUSAL on the next model release (Grahym or the next Southbridge collection) with York-style turnkey terms + leaseback. Incentive precedent: $20K flex on move-in-ready. ⚠ SC 6% investor assessment applies during any leaseback.
features: York model sold fast — proven program
Months of leaseback runway (community sells thru Dec)

listings.address: Context at Oakhurst, Homesite 13 (furnished Rockwell), Charlotte, NC 28205
listings.description: Rob Dybec offered the furnished Rockwell (HS13) with furniture FREE (5/30), then the incentive structure shifted and you walked (6/15) — cleanly, with your interest on record. If Archer Row and Fort Mill stall, re-enter at YOUR number: prior $20K precedent + furniture + the deal that fell through on HS78 gives Rob motivation. Their actual model home (furniture 'stays with the model') is also still upstream for release.

NEW from 7/5 research: Mungo's (Clayton/Berkshire) newest Charlotte townhome community — ~300 homes, 1,471–1,697 sqft, in your triangulated 28216 corridor (2027 upside pick #2 + Corridors of Opportunity). Multi-phase = model homes on site for YEARS = multiple leaseback windows; first-phase model buyers get the longest runway. ⚠ Mungo buyer reviews 1.6/5 with validated-then-ignored warranty pattern — inspection + written warranty timelines mandatory. Pricing unverified; get it in writing on site.

From your 'Ryan Homes Communities of Charlotte' doc: from $284,990, 1,576–1,681 sqft — sits in 28216, inside your #2-ranked 2027 upside corridor (West Blvd/West CLT momentum) at the cheapest Mecklenburg new-TH entry. Price play, not a leaseback play; incentives tied to NVR Mortgage. Ask about closeout models as the community sells through.

listings.address: Cherry Grove Townhomes — Juniper model, Kannapolis, NC 28081
listings.description: Home-of-the-Month from your inbox: $269,990 with $5K incentive (NVR Mortgage). Best raw price-per-foot on the board ($137/sqft) in the metro's best growth-to-price submarket. Leaseback unlikely (NVR runs asset-light) — this is a price play, not a leaseback play. Rep: Vineta Pritchard. ⚠ INSIGHT CHECK: conflicts with your own avoid rule — far-out new construction with remaining builder lots; treat as long-hold cash-flow only.

CURATED LEAD (verify by phone): Taylor Morrison runs a marketed model-home sale-leaseback program (typically 12–24 months, builder maintains the home, ~5-7% leaseback yield). Bryton is their north-corridor master-plan with townhome product near your ceiling. Ask for the model home investment program sheet.

CURATED LEAD (verify by phone): True Homes is the big local builder (Monroe HQ) — local decision-makers say yes/no fast. Model leasebacks negotiable at grand openings of successor communities; Union County's low taxes (0.77%) flatter the cash flow.

CURATED LEAD (verify by phone): Meritage does model-sale leasebacks near closeout case-by-case; energy-spec homes rent at a premium and Cabarrus is the metro's best growth-to-price county. Under budget with furniture.

listings.address: Sugar Creek Townes (model), Indian Land, SC 29707
listings.description: CURATED LEAD (verify by phone): Mattamy does Carolinas model leasebacks — BUT this one carries the SC trap: non-owner-occupied SC property is assessed at a 6% ratio, roughly tripling property tax vs an NC equivalent during the leaseback. Run the numbers tab before pursuing.

note: Link-audited 2026-07-12: removed 4 entries that matched fabricated sample data (Sterling Pointe, Mallard Pointe, University Townes, Robinwood Commons); fixed Nichols Landing + Sunset Creek URLs.
